error_signature: Could not get the SHA of the file
title: GitHub Node fails to get SHA for files with special characters
symptom: When trying to edit a file in GitHub with a name that includes '#' or emojis, n8n throws an error stating 'Could not get the SHA of the file'.
applies_when: File name includes special characters like '#' or emojis
not_this_if: File names do not include special characters
Using a different node or integration
root_cause: The GitHub node in n8n uses the wrong encoding function for file paths that contain special characters. Specifically, it uses 'encodeURI' instead of 'encodeURIComponent', which leads to issues when trying to retrieve the SHA of the file.
fix_steps: Identify the GitHub node in your workflow
Check the file path being used
If it contains special characters, consider modifying the source code to use encodeURIComponent instead of encodeURI
Test the workflow again after making changes
agent_instruction: Modify the GitHub node's source code to use encodeURIComponent for file paths with special characters.
